requirement_text: The RTI shall populate `turnInteractionsOn` callback arguments consistently with the federation state transition, object instance, attribute, interaction, ownership, or time-management event being reported.
notes: Targeted callback test now proves the callback payload is exactly the expected `InteractionClassHandle` for the affected interaction class.

requirement_text: The federate ambassador binding shall expose `turnInteractionsOn` with return type `void` and standard arguments: InteractionClassHandle theHandle.
notes: Static signature audit now proves the federate-ambassador binding exists and the source-derived API metadata records the standard Java callback parameter shape.

requirement_text: The RTI shall issue the Turn Interactions Off callback through the federate ambassador `turnInteractionsOff` operation when the standard callback conditions are satisfied.
notes: Direct declaration-management callback tests now prove `turnInteractionsOff` is emitted from real publisher/subscriber usefulness transitions.

requirement_text: The RTI shall deliver `turnInteractionsOff` in the callback model selected by the federate and in an order consistent with standard service, save/restore, time-management, and message-delivery rules.
notes: Targeted callback test now isolates the declaration callbacks and proves the turn-off callback follows the paired turn-on callback in the observed sequence.

requirement_text: The RTI shall populate `turnInteractionsOff` callback arguments consistently with the federation state transition, object instance, attribute, interaction, ownership, or time-management event being reported.
notes: Targeted callback test now proves the callback payload is exactly the expected `InteractionClassHandle` for the affected interaction class.
